description:
Kling image generation.

Modes:
- Text-to-image: prompt only
- Image-to-image: prompt + image + image_reference (subject or face)

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate. Max 2500 chars.
examples: A futuristic cityscape at night with neon lights and flying cars
prompt.title: Prompt

image.description: Reference image for image-to-image generation. Requires image_reference to be set.
image.title: Image

image_reference.description: How to use the reference image: 'subject' for character features, 'face' for facial appearance.

image_fidelity.description: Reference image strength [0-1]. Higher = closer to reference.
image_fidelity.title: Image Fidelity

human_fidelity.description: Facial similarity [0-1]. Only used with 'subject' reference type.
human_fidelity.title: Human Fidelity

negative_prompt.description: What to avoid in the image. Not supported with image reference.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

resolution.description: Output resolution. 2k only supported by kling-v2.

n.description: Number of images to generate (1-9). Each counts as one concurrency slot.
n.title: N

title: AppInput
